calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for (administrator) Vincent Caruana.

Ms. Mayo responded to the examiner's notes stating that Mr. Caruana had to take a last minute flight and was unable to get a lower airfare, that the flight to New York was to collect the ashes, that she had explained to him that he may not be able to claim the meals, that the charge for cigarettes should not have been included in the charges, that he needed a rental car and was unable to obtain street parking and that the court can interlineate the order as necessary. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
